title: Umiya Temple, Unjha
tagline: Umiya Temple, Unjha — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: Umiya Mata Temple is a Hindu temple of the goddess Umiya, the clan-deity or kuldevi of the Kadava Patidars.
overview.description: Umiya Mata Temple is a Hindu temple of the goddess Umiya, the clan-deity or kuldevi of the Kadava Patidars. It is located in the center of Unjha, Mehsana district, Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Unjha
topPlaces.description: Unjha is a town and a municipality in the Mehsana district of the Indian state of Gujarat. Unjha is 26 km north of Mehsana and 102 km north of Ahmedabad.

topPlaces.name: Maktupur
topPlaces.description: Maktupur is a small village in North Gujarat, West India. It is in Mehsana district.

topPlaces.name: Aithor
topPlaces.description: Aithor is a village in Unjha Taluka of Mehsana district, Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhankhar
topPlaces.description: Bhankhar is a village in Unjha Taluka of Mahesana district in Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Unava
topPlaces.description: Unava is a village located near Unjha, in Mehsana district of Gujarat, India. It is on the SH41 (Mehsana-Palanpur).

topPlaces.name: Tundav
topPlaces.description: Tundav is a village in the Mehsana district in the north of Gujarat, India. As of 2011, it had a population of 4,280.

topPlaces.name: Jetalvasana
topPlaces.description: Jetalvasana (Jetalvāsaṇā) is a village of Visnagar Taluka in Mehsana district in the Indian state of Gujarat with a population in 2011 of 3311 persons.

topPlaces.name: Valinath Mahadev Temple
topPlaces.description: Valinath Mahadev Temple is a Hindu temple, dedicated to Shiva, located in Tarabh village in Visnagar Taluka of Mehsana district, Gujarat, India. It was opened in February 2024.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Umiya Temple, Unjha?
faq.a: The best time to visit Umiya Temple, Unjha is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Umiya Temple, Unjha?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport, Ahmedabad (84 km) and the nearest railway station is Ahmedabad Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Umiya Temple, Unjha?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Umiya Temple, Unjha at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Umiya Temple, Unjha?
faq.a: Stays in Umiya Temple, Unjha start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Umiya Temple, Unjha?
faq.a: The top attractions are Unjha, Maktupur, Aithor, Bhankhar, Unava.
